---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working correctly
labels: bug
---

**What did you ask Claude Code to review?**
<!-- e.g. "Uncommitted changes in a Rust project with ~20 modified files" -->

**What went wrong?**
<!-- Describe the issue: broken rendering, missing sections, wrong tab classification, template not found, etc. -->

**Expected behavior**
<!-- What should have happened instead? -->

**Claude Code version**
<!-- Run `claude --version` and paste the output -->

**Additional context**
<!-- Screenshots, error messages, or the generated HTML file (if relevant) -->
